code: ### Optionally: specify GitHub Personal Access Token (GITHUB_PAT) ### See here why this might be important for you: ### https://kwb-r.github.io/kwb.pkgbuild/articles/install.html#set-your-github_pat  # Sys.setenv(GITHUB_PAT = "mysecret_access_token")  # Install package "remotes" from CRAN if (! require("remotes")) {   install.packages("remotes", repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org") }  # Install KWB package 'kwb.smartwater' from GitHub remotes::install_github("KWB-R/kwb.smartwater")

what: Vegetation Class Increment Caused by Planting Trees — n_trees_to_veg_class_increment
title: Vegetation Class Increment Caused by Planting Trees — n_trees_to_veg_class_increment
text: Vegetation Class Increment Caused Planting Trees

title: Vegetation Class Increment Caused by Planting Trees — n_trees_to_veg_class_increment
Vegetation Class Increment Caused by Planting Trees — n_trees_to_veg_class_increment
text: n_trees number trees planted unpaved_area_m2 unpaved area (= total_area * (1 - roof - pvd)) m2 m slope linear relation normalised vegetation volume per unpaved area (vegnorm) veg_scaled. Default: 4.7, calculated block highest vegetation class Berlin (code = 0000000012002198): m = veg_scaled/vegnorm = 118.1306/24.92435 volume_per_tree_m3 assumed green volume per tree m3. Default: 400 (440 m3 determined Bayerischer Platz, Berlin, rounded nearest multiple 100)

title: Plot Effect of Disconnecting Surfaces from Sewer System — plot_effect_of_disconnect
text: surface_reduction reduction connected surface percent type one "critical_hours", "unpleasant_hours", "critical_events", "negative_deviation" output_dir NULL (default), plot goes active device, otherwise plot written png file within output_dir (must existing directory) width_factor width factor. Default: 10/6.789581

title: Plot Effect of Disconnecting Surfaces from Sewer System — plot_effect_of_disconnect
